skill.name: defou-stanley-workflow
skill.description: Generate structured Chinese social content with routing, draft variants, hooks, scoring, and posting advice.
skill.summary: Turns raw ideas into structured Chinese social media drafts using Defou x Stanley content templates.
skill.author: wangdefou-dev

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported ransomware, weak cryptography, reconnaissance, and entropy indicators, but review found prompt text, markdown structure, and marketplace report prose rather than executable behavior. No evidence found of malicious intent, network access, filesystem access, command execution, secret access, or prompt injection targeting the evaluator.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Keywords
low_findings.description: The flagged weak cryptography locations are prose, placeholders, or prior report text. No cryptographic implementation, hashing call, encryption routine, or password handling code was found at these lines.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines contain markdown front matter, Chinese description text, English placeholders, and marketplace content examples. There is no executable code or crypto API usage at the flagged locations.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Ransomware Keyword
low_findings.description: The flagged ransomware location is audit summary text that discusses a scanner false positive about encrypted content. It does not instruct encryption, file locking, payment demand, or destructive behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is a human-readable security summary, not skill logic. No ransomware workflow, payload, file operation, or coercive instruction is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: The flagged reconnaissance locations are content generation examples and anti-pattern guidance. No commands collect host, user, network, environment, or process information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Context shows report copy about content versions and safe usage guidance. There is no system inspection command or data collection request.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Entropy and Obfuscation Heuristics
low_findings.description: High entropy findings appear to be caused by Chinese text and markdown/report formatting. The files are readable text and contain no encoded payload, packed binary, or hidden executable content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced files are plain text markdown and JSON. The entropy signal does not align with encoded code, binary blobs, or obfuscated instructions.

content.value_statement: Creators often have raw ideas but lack a repeatable structure for strong social posts. This skill routes ideas into content templates and produces drafts, hooks, scores, and posting advice.
actual_capabilities: Routes user material into one of four content template types.
Generates three draft styles for the selected angle.
Creates four hook options for each draft style.
Scores drafts on curiosity, resonance, clarity, and shareability.
Suggests a posting time based on the content type.
Formats the result as a markdown content generation report.
limitations: It does not publish content to social platforms.
It does not fetch live trend data or platform analytics.
It is optimized for Chinese social media writing.
It depends on the quality and specificity of user input.

use_cases.title: Turn daily observations into posts
use_cases.description: Convert a raw idea, story, or opinion into structured short-form content with hooks and scoring.

use_cases.title: Draft campaign social copy
use_cases.description: Transform product messages into several Chinese social post angles for review and testing.

use_cases.title: Compare content angles
use_cases.description: Use routing, angle selection, and draft scoring to choose stronger post directions.

prompt_templates.title: Create a basic post
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this workflow to turn my idea into a Chinese social post: [paste idea].

prompt_templates.title: Select the best template
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this material, choose the best T1 to T4 template, and explain the routing: [paste material].

prompt_templates.title: Generate full draft variants
prompt_templates.prompt: Create three draft versions with four hooks each for this audience: [audience]. Material: [paste material].

prompt_templates.title: Evaluate and refine angles
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the full Defou x Stanley workflow, score each version, identify the strongest angle, and suggest edits for platform fit.

output_examples.input: A creator wants to write about wasting money on an online course.
output: The report selects the counter-motivational template.
It proposes three angles about anxiety, learning illusions, and decision cost.
It returns viral, deep, and blended draft versions.
It includes hook options, a score, and a suggested posting time.

output_examples.input: A team wants a social post about why users ignore a new product feature.
output: The workflow frames the issue as a practical value post.
It turns feature language into user pain points.
It suggests a concise hook and a clearer call to action.

output_examples.input: A strategist needs to compare several angles for a trending debate.
output: The workflow routes the topic to a hot-event template.
It separates neutral observation from emotional hooks.
It recommends the angle with the strongest share value.

best_practices: Provide specific facts, audience context, and desired platform before asking for drafts.
Review generated claims and examples before publishing them.
Use the scoring section to compare angles, not as a guarantee of performance.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for generic viral content without a topic or audience.
Do not publish sensitive personal details included in source material.
Do not use the workflow to create misleading claims or fake evidence.

faq.question: What does this skill create?
faq.answer: It creates structured Chinese social media drafts with routing, angles, hooks, scores, and posting advice.

faq.question: Does it post content automatically?
faq.answer: No. It only generates drafts and recommendations for manual review.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Does it use live social media data?
faq.answer: No. It relies on the user material and the templates in the skill.

faq.question: Can it write in English?
faq.answer: The workflow can be adapted, but the skill instructions are optimized for Chinese content.

faq.question: Is human review still needed?
faq.answer: Yes. Review tone, factual claims, privacy, and brand fit before publishing.
